message:
Implement check_reserved_lock via posix_getlk

Replace check_reserved_lock() stub (always returned false) with
actual POSIX lock query using posix_getlk() with F_WRLCK on
RESERVED_BYTE. Returns true if another process holds a reserved
lock on the database file. Remove #[allow(dead_code)] from
posix_getlk since it is now used.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
